DP.180.0000:
Cynthia: The room ahead is the Hall
of Fame...\f
DP.180.0001:
Rowan: [0103,0000]!
Your last battle was splendid!\f
DP.180.0003:
Rowan: Hm!\f
A child I enlisted for my Pokédex
project has come this far...\f
It’s only natural that I come and
witness the child’s crowning glory.\f
[0103,0000]!
I shouldn’t call you a child anymore.\r
You’ve grown into a real Champion!\f
DP.180.0004:
Cynthia: Professor, you still enjoy
the enthusiasm kids bring to\r
your research, don’t you?\f
DP.180.0007:
Professor Rowan, I need you over
here, as well.\f
